title: OpenCosmos General Extension
description: STAC OpenCosmos General Extension for DataCosmos satellite imagery products. Captures commercial, permission and general product metadata shared across collections. Payload-specific and quality-assurance metadata live in dedicated companion extensions (opencosmos-qa, opencosmos-simera, opencosmos-processing, ...).

oneOf.$comment: This is the schema for STAC Items.
This is the schema for STAC Catalogs and Collections.

opencosmos:price.title: Price
opencosmos:price.description: Price of the product. Stored as a string to preserve decimal precision.

opencosmos:price_currency.title: Price Currency
opencosmos:price_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the price.

opencosmos:data_area_km2.title: Data Area (km²)
opencosmos:data_area_km2.description: Total coverage area of the data in square kilometers.

opencosmos:resolution.title: Resolution
opencosmos:resolution.description: Resolution level served for this product. 'full' exposes native resolution assets, 'limited'/'preview' expose reduced-resolution assets.

opencosmos:high_resolution_read_permissi.title: High Resolution Read Permission
opencosmos:high_resolution_read_permissi.description: Indicates whether the requesting user has permission to access high-resolution data.

opencosmos:collection_type.title: Collection Type
opencosmos:collection_type.description: Type of collection containing this item.

opencosmos:session_id.title: Session ID
opencosmos:session_id.description: Unique identifier for the image acquisition session, generated by the payload.

opencosmos:activity_id.title: Activity ID
opencosmos:activity_id.description: Identifier of the tasking/processing activity that produced the item. The sentinel value 'not_found' is used when the activity could not be resolved.

opencosmos:emergency.title: Emergency
opencosmos:emergency.description: Indicates whether the acquisition was tasked as part of an emergency response.

opencosmos:payloads.title: Payloads
opencosmos:payloads.description: Payload(s) involved in producing the item.

id.title: Payload ID
id.description: Identifier of the payload on the spacecraft.

session.title: Session
session.description: Acquisition session identifier for the payload.

opencosmos:orbit_number_source.title: Orbit Number Source
opencosmos:orbit_number_source.description: Origin of the orbit number associated with the acquisition.

opencosmos:scale.title: Scale
opencosmos:scale.description: Scale factor applied to the product.

opencosmos:per_payload_time_sync_s.title: Per Payload Time Sync (s)
opencosmos:per_payload_time_sync_s.description: Time synchronisation offset in seconds keyed by payload identifier.

opencosmos:calibration_site_type.title: Calibration Site Type
opencosmos:calibration_site_type.description: Type of calibration site imaged during a calibration acquisition.

opencosmos:tasking_request_id.title: Tasking Request ID
opencosmos:tasking_request_id.description: Identifier of the tasking request that led to the acquisition.

opencosmos:session.title: Session
opencosmos:session.description: Acquisition session(s) associated with the item, per payload.

payload_id.title: Payload ID
payload_id.description: Identifier of the payload on the spacecraft.

session_id.title: Session ID
session_id.description: Acquisition session identifier for the payload.
